moderators.language_notes: Language switcher available with 8 languages including English, Chinese variants, Japanese, Korean, Portuguese (Brazil), Spanish (Spain), and French

evidence.API_evidence: Multiple API products documented: Rapid API (Lodging, Car, Flight, Activities), Connectivity Hub, Analytics, Travel Redirect API. API Explorer provides interactive testing. SDK usage examples show GET, POST, PUT operations.
evidence.SDK_evidence: Java SDK available for Rapid API with overview, quick start, and usage examples. GitHub repositories include expediagroup-java-sdk, rapid-java-sdk, and xap-java-sdk in Kotlin/Java.
evidence.AI_evidence: No AI-specific resources found in the developer portal content.
evidence.language_evidence: Language switcher shows 8 languages: English, 繁體中文, 한국어, Português (Brasil), Español (España), 简体中文, Japanese, Français (France). Console login page shows additional languages including Deutsch and Italiano.

coding_notes: PLAT=REGISTRATION based on console.expediagroup.com login/signup page. API=1 from multiple API products. METH=2 from SDK examples showing GET, POST, PUT operations. BUG=1 from API Explorer interactive console. ROLE=1 from account-based access requiring login. DATA=1 from comprehensive Privacy Statement and Terms of Use. OPEN=1 from free signup availability on console page.

changes.GIT_prog_lang_list: "Java; TypeScript; Kotlin; JavaScript; Python; Shell; Go; HCL" → "Bash/Shell; Go; Java; JavaScript; Kotlin; Python; TypeScript"
